title: diphasiastrum zanclophyllum
intro: Diphasiastrum zanclophyllum, also known as the Zanclophyllum forked spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a type of lycophyte, a vascular plant that lacks true leaves and flowers, and is commonly found in North America. Diphasiastrum zanclophyllum has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
